acceptance_targets: [chapter_15_f001] Pass if, by the end of the revised scene between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:455 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:580, Gabe explicitly knows June created Eli and his reaction names or clearly targets June; fail if the scene still ends with Gabe asking who did it and the answer remaining withheld.

[chapter_15_f002] Pass if the revised opening between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:20 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:64 adds at least one additional on-page artifact sequence that Lena reads or listens to in real time and that reveals either the financial manipulation or the family's exposure through concrete quoted or described material, followed by a visible reaction from Lena; fail if those damages remain only listed or paraphrased.

[FA-001] Pass if snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6780, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6782, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6784, and snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6786 now reproduce the same three amounts and payment methods already shown in chapters 5, 7, and 9, and the total reads as $3,730 before fee. Fail if the chapter still shows $380, $460, $2,400, $3,240, calls the motel payment Venmo, or otherwise conflicts with the earlier transfer scenes.

[FA-010] Pass if snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:7330 remains the only 'almost' beat among these three lines and the other two moments now register through different behavior. Fail if chapter 15 still repeats the construction three times.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, by the end of the revised scene between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:455 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:580, Gabe explicitly knows June created Eli and his reaction names or clearly targets June; fail if the scene still ends with Gabe asking who did it and the answer remaining withheld.
findings.problem: The chapter withholds June's identity from Gabe even after he directly asks who ran Eli. That leaves Gabe without the full truth by chapter end, which conflicts with the continuity sheet's chapter_15 state change and trims the communal consequence the chapter is supposed to land.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:246 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:455, then through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:580, either let Lena name June on page or restructure the final movement so Gabe unmistakably learns June built Eli before the chapter closes; then dramatize the immediate family or block-level fallout instead of deferring it to the next chapter.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised opening between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:20 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:64 adds at least one additional on-page artifact sequence that Lena reads or listens to in real time and that reveals either the financial manipulation or the family's exposure through concrete quoted or described material, followed by a visible reaction from Lena; fail if those damages remain only listed or paraphrased.
findings.problem: The opening promises a forensic rereading of the archive, but after one voice note and one sexual callback it mostly compresses the money trail and the family contamination into list entries and retrospective summary. That keeps one of the chapter's richest sources of damage reported rather than fully suffered on page.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:20 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:56, extending through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:64, replace part of the legal-pad and favorites summary with a rendered artifact encounter from a different pressure lane than the sex notes, such as a money ask or a speakerphone exchange involving Gabe's household, so the archive scene itself carries more of the chapter's social and financial devastation before Lena tells Farah and Gabe about it.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6780, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6782, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6784, and snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6786 now reproduce the same three amounts and payment methods already shown in chapters 5, 7, and 9, and the total reads as $3,730 before fee. Fail if the chapter still shows $380, $460, $2,400, $3,240, calls the motel payment Venmo, or otherwise conflicts with the earlier transfer scenes.
findings.problem: The evidence packet in the reveal chapter rewrites the novel's already-established transfer history into a different set of amounts, payment rails, and total: $380, $460 via Venmo, and $2,400 totaling $3,240. Earlier chapters explicitly dramatize $350 via Cash App, $280 via Cash App, and a $3,100 wire. Because this chapter turns suspicion into proof, the wrong accounting makes the book's own case file unreliable.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rebuild the ledger block at snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6780, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6782, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6784, and snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6786 so it matches the canonical transfers established at snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2647, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3627, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4266, and snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4288: first transfer $350 via Cash App for the van window/sound gear, second transfer $280 via Cash App for Noelle's room, third transfer $3,100 by wire, total $3,730 before the $25 bank fee. Keep Farah's prosecutorial clarity, but make the paperwork factually usable.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:7330 remains the only 'almost' beat among these three lines and the other two moments now register through different behavior. Fail if chapter 15 still repeats the construction three times.
findings.problem: The novel's 9-chapter 'almost [verb]' pattern shows up three more times here, at lines 6938, 7182, and 7330. The confession-hinge at 7330 is the one worth keeping; the other two dilute it.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6938 and snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:7182, replace the 'almost smiled' and 'almost laughed' beats with more singular reactions. Keep the confession-suppressing beat at snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:7330, since that is the book's strongest late use of the pattern and earns its pressure.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the embarrassing specifics: transfer amounts, body awkwardness, neighborhood petty detail, ugly motives, and the unstable overlap between care and control. When a choice arises between a safer generalized line and a sharper socially revealing one, choose the sharper line unless it breaks character truth.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene reaches sex, money shame, betrayal, or bodily disgust and the prose flinches into summary or tasteful fog, revise toward concrete action, sensory residue, and social consequence.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are normal in almost all spoken English here; full forms are reserved for emphasis, class performance, or moments of deliberate control.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate compressed one-scene chapters with socially dense multi-scene chapters; follow hot chapters with quiet domestic ones, let comic humiliation sit beside grief, and vary dialogue density so no two consecutive chapters share the same pulse.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary, unsanitized, class-attentive English with enough lyric lift to surprise but not enough polish to float above the bodies and bills in the room.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: tight third person centered on Lena, with no head-hopping; June and Eli are knowable only through what Lena hears, sees, infers, and later uncovers in artifacts.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Supple, pressure-sensitive sentences that can hold embarrassment and desire in the same line, then snap short at moments of exposure or financial pain.
